---
title: 'Dear Her'
date: '2020-02-21T17:00:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5923551173976741283'
blogger_filename: '/2020/02/dear-her.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Dear Her'
---

It's been six months since I wrote. Between August 2019 and February 2020 I've experienced a massive shift in my soul, character, desires, mindsets, even in my body. I've lost ten pounds by engaging in Whole30, and I want to keep loosing weight because I need to be all I can be for God. I just wanted to check in because I'm listening to the story on Shawn Bloz where a dancer met her husband and knew that day. I don't know you yet but I love you.&nbsp;
